0.text: ENF 053/2025 Standard Chartered PLC v Standard Chartered Bank

3.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

4.text: IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE

11.text: ORDER OF H.E. DEPUTY CHIEF JUSTICE ALI AL MADHANI

12.text: UPON reviewing Dubai Law No. 2 of 2025 concerning the DIFC Courts (the “DIFC Court Law”)

13.text: AND UPON reviewing the Applicant’s P45/01 application (the “Application”) for the enforcement of the Order of the Honourable Mr Justice Michael Green issued in the English High Court in Various Investors v Standard Chartered Plc, with Claim Numbers FL-2020-000038, FL-2021- 000011, FL-2022-000009, and FL-2022-000023 dated 27 August 2024, as amended on 26 November 2024 (the “Disclosure Order”)

14.text: AND UPON reviewing the Rules of the DIFC Court (the “RDC”)

15.text: AND UPON hearing counsel for the Applicant at a hearing held before H.E. Deputy Chief Justice Ali Al Madhani on 29 April 2025 (the “Hearing”)

18.text: 2. The Disclosure Order is ratifi ed, recognised and enforced as an order of the DIFC Court pursuant to Article 31(4) of the DIFC Court Law.

19.text: 3. There shall be no order as to costs.

21.text:
Issued by:   
Delvin Sumo

Date of Issue: 30 April 2025
